c.d: The ability for users to rate and review movies, providing personal insights and opinions.
Features that allow users to connect with friends, share recommendations, and see friends' ratings.
The app's capability to suggest movies based on user preferences and viewing history.
Tools for users to create and manage lists of movies they want to watch.
Information on where to watch or stream movies, including integration with streaming services.
The design and usability of the app, ensuring a seamless and engaging user experience.
The availability of the app across different platforms (iOS, Android, web).
The level of user interaction within the app, such as forums, discussions, and community events.
The comprehensiveness and accuracy of the movie database within the app.
Information on whether the app is free, offers in-app purchases, or requires a subscription.
